chunks.text:
SOURCE: 03_onboarding_guide.pdf | pág. 1
TITLE: Programa de Onboarding para Nuevos Empleados

[PÁGINA 1]
--- DATOS TABULARES (Pág 1) ---
| Time | Activity | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 09:00 | Welcome meeting with HR | HR |
| 10:00 | IT setup & security training | IT |
| 11:00 | Meet your manager and team | Manager |
| 12:30 | Team lunch | Team |
| 14:00 | Company values & culture session | HR |
| 15:30 | Benefits enrolment walkthrough | HR |
| 16:30 | Wrap-up & Q&A | Manager |
-----------------------------

New Employee Onboarding Guide

Welcome aboard! Your first 90 days.

Before Your First Day
HR will send you a welcome pack 5 business days before your start date. It includes:

 • Employment contract and GDPR consent form (please sign and return)
 • IT equipment delivery confirmation
 • Access credentials for HR portal and Slack
 • Your first-week schedule

Day 1 Checklist

Time Activity Owner

09:00 Welcome meeting with HR HR

10:00 IT setup & security training IT

11:00 Meet your manager and team Manager

12:30 Team lunch Team

14:00 Company values & culture session HR

15:30 Benefits enrolment walkthrough HR

16:30 Wrap-up & Q&A Manager

30 / 60 / 90 Day Goals

First 30 Days — Learn
 • Complete all mandatory training (GDPR, Security, Anti-bribery)
 • Shadow at least 3 different team members
 • Set up 1:1s with key stakeholders
 • Understand your team's OKRs for the current quarter

Days 31–60 — Contribute
 • Take ownership of at least one small project or task
 • Present a 'learnings so far' to your manager
 • Join at least one cross-functional meeting

Days 61–90 — Deliver
 • Complete your first formal goal-setting with manager
 • Deliver your first independent piece of work
 • Complete the 90-day survey (sent automatically by HR)

metadata.semantic_headline: Programa de Onboarding para Nuevos Empleados
metadata.semantic_summary: El programa de onboarding para nuevos empleados abarca las actividades del primer día, incluyendo reuniones con HR y capacitación en IT. Se establece un plan de 30, 60 y 90 días para aprender, contribuir y entregar resultados. Este enfoque asegura una integración efectiva en la cultura y objetivos de la empresa.

chunks.text:
SOURCE: 03_onboarding_guide.pdf | pág. 2
TITLE: Herramientas y Sistemas Clave para Empleados

[PÁGINA 2]
--- DATOS TABULARES (Pág 2) ---
| System | Purpose | Access |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Slack | Internal communication | IT Day 1 |
| Notion | Documentation & wikis | IT Day 1 |
| JIRA | Project & task tracking | Manager request |
| Bamboo HR | HR portal (leave, payslips) | HR Day 1 |
| Google Workspace | Email, Docs, Calendar | IT Day 1 |
| Lattice | Performance & OKRs | HR Week 1 |

| Need | Contact |
| --- | --- |
| IT issues | it-support@hrkb.internal | Slack: #it-help |
| HR questions | hr@hrkb.internal | Slack: #hr-team |
| Payroll & expenses | finance@hrkb.internal |
| Mental health support | wellbeing@hrkb.internal (confidential) |
| Ethics concerns | ethics-hotline@hrkb.internal (anonymous) |
-----------------------------

Key Systems & Tools

System Purpose Access

Slack Internal communication IT Day 1

Notion Documentation & wikis IT Day 1

JIRA Project & task tracking Manager request

Bamboo HR HR portal (leave, payslips) HR Day 1

Google Workspace Email, Docs, Calendar IT Day 1

 Lattice Performance & OKRs HR Week 1

Probation Period
The probation period lasts 90 days. During this time you will have structured check-ins with your
manager at day 30, 60, and 90. At the end of probation, your manager will confirm your employment
in writing. Remote working and stock options are not available during probation.

Who to Contact

Need Contact

IT issues it-support@hrkb.internal | Slack: #it-help

HR questions hr@hrkb.internal | Slack: #hr-team

 Payroll & expenses finance@hrkb.internal

Mental health support wellbeing@hrkb.internal (confidential)

Ethics concerns ethics-hotline@hrkb.internal (anonymous)

metadata.semantic_headline: Herramientas y Sistemas Clave para Empleados
metadata.semantic_summary: Este chunk enumera los sistemas y herramientas esenciales para los empleados, como Slack y Google Workspace, junto con su propósito y acceso. Se destaca la importancia de contactar a IT o HR para resolver problemas. La información es vital para la eficiencia operativa desde el primer día.
